items.title: Gordon stars as England beat Costa Rica in final World Cup warm-up
items.summary: Anthony Gordon starred as England stepped up their World Cup preparations with a 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final official friendly before the tournament.

items.title: England player ratings: Has Bellingham done enough?
items.summary: England have played their final World Cup warm-up game. Next comes the real thing. So, who has nailed down their spot? Who has played themselves into contention? And who has damaged their chances of being in Thomas Tuchel's starting selection against Croatia?

items.title: Infantino could have stood up for the World Cup - but he said 'chill, relax'
items.summary: Gianni Infantino faced the media for the first time in three years, but he did little to convince that Fifa has lost its grip on the organisation of the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: England fans call for shock World Cup kit change as Thomas Tuchel’s men look to emulate heroes of ‘66

items.title: England Wags fly into luxury World Cup base for romantic reunions after Tuchel relaxes camp rules
items.summary: WIVES and girlfriends are being allowed into the England squad’s hotel — despite an initial ban on joining their partners.
